title: ochroxylum schreberi
intro: Ochroxylum schreberi, also known as Bael, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical regions of Asia, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The medicinal properties of Ochroxylum schreberi lie in its bark, leaves, and fruit, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ochroxylum schreberi include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, treat skin conditions, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Ochroxylum schreberi is prepared as an herbal decoction, tea, or tincture, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for treating various health ailments.
